summary_en: ¥10.0B upper limit, 8,000,000 shares (7.1% of outstanding), execution via open market and ToSTNeT-3, May 15, 2026 – Mar 31, 2027. Reason: capital efficiency and shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice of Decision on Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief:
On May 14, 2026, the board of Nihon Parkerizing resolved to acquire treasury shares under the company law framework. The program authorizes acquisition of up to 8,000,000 shares (7.1% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate maximum of ¥10.0 billion. The acquisition period runs from May 15, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The company will execute purchases via open market transactions and ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours block trading on Tokyo Stock Exchange).

The company stated the acquisition is intended to enhance capital efficiency (specifically ROE), boost shareholder returns, and enable flexible capital allocation in response to business conditions. The decision was made after reviewing recent share price trends and PBR levels in the context of enterprise value enhancement.
